summary: Lewis Hamilton's arrival injects fresh momentum into Ferrari's flagging championship bid, as the Scuderia seeks to harness the seven-time champion's confidence following his dominant Spanish victory. McLaren's relentless pace development threatens to splinter the title fight into a three-way battle, forcing Ferrari and Red Bull to execute flawless strategy and qualifying performance at Spa's high-speed corners. A strong result here could stabilize Ferrari's championship position or expose the depth of their mid-season struggles, with Hamilton's presence either catalyzing a resurgence or becoming a symbol of missed opportunity.
